meta.question: Find signals under "_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals" that are still referenced by active diagrams.
meta.finalAnswer:
No signals under "_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals" are referenced by active diagrams.

After extensive analysis, I found 13 signals stored in the "_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals" package:
- APS-TCS::Receive reply from TCS
- APS-TCS::Ask TCS to point telescope to the star
- APS-TCS::M3_Status_Position_Query
- APS-TCS::M3_Status_Position_Ack
- APS-Internal::signal_GetK-MirrPos_A
- APS-Internal::signal_GetTiltPlate_A
- APS-Internal::signal_SelectFilter_Ack
- APS-Internal::signal_SelectFilter_Query
- APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Query
- APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Ack
- APS-Internal::signal_take_expoure_A
- APS-CommonService::signal_Get_segment_intalled_Ack
- APS-CommonService::signal_Get_segment_intalled_Query

However, these signals are only referenced by other elements within the recycle bin itself (such as send signal actions and signal events that are also in the recycle bin). There are no references from active diagrams (elements outside the recycle bin) to these signals.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("_TMT_RecycleBin"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "_TMT_RecycleBin" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("01 signals")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("signals")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?pkg), LCASE("_TMT_RecycleBin")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "_TMT_RecycleBin" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?s rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?type), "signal"))
}
GROUP BY ?type
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("01 signals")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), LCASE("_TMT_RecycleBin")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), LCASE("_TMT_RecycleBin"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("signal")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("01 signals")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("01 signals")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name WHERE {
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?diagram ?name WHERE {
  ?diagram rdf:type vocab:diagram .
  ?diagram vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(NOT CONTAINS(STR(?diagram), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?diagram ?name WHERE {
  ?diagram rdf:type vocab:diagram .
  ?diagram vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?diagram), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?s rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?type), "Diagram"))
}
GROUP BY ?type
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?s rdf:type ?type .
}
GROUP BY ?type
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?s rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?type), "view"))
}
GROUP BY ?type
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(NOT CONTAINS(STR(?view), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name (COUNT(?view) as ?viewCount) WHERE {
  # Get signals from recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find views that reference these signals (not in recycle bin)
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?view), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Check different ways signals can be referenced
  { ?action vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?signal . ?action vocab:Action_activity ?activity . ?activity vocab:Activity_node ?node . ?node vocab:ActivityNode_inGroup ?view . }
  UNION
  { ?trigger vocab:Trigger_event ?event . ?event rdf:type vocab:signalEvent . ?event vocab:SignalEvent_signal ?signal . ?trigger vocab:Trigger_port ?port . ?port vocab:Port_invocationActionOfOnPort ?action . ?action vocab:Action_activity ?activity . ?activity vocab:Activity_node ?node . ?node vocab:ActivityNode_inGroup ?view . }
}
GROUP BY ?signal ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?viewCount)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name ?ref ?refType WHERE {
  # Get signals from recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find elements that reference this signal (anywhere)
  ?ref ?prop ?signal .
  ?ref rdf:type ?refType .
  
  # Exclude the signal itself
  FILTER(?ref != ?signal)
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name ?ref ?refType WHERE {
  # Get a signal NOT in recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find elements that reference this signal
  ?ref ?prop ?signal .
  ?ref rdf:type ?refType .
  
  FILTER(?ref != ?signal)
}
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?action ?name ?signal ?signalName WHERE {
  ?action rdf:type vocab:send%20signal%20action .
  ?action vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .
  OPTIONAL { ?action vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?ref ?prop ?signal ?signalName WHERE {
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  ?ref ?prop ?signal .
}
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?event ?name ?signal ?signalName WHERE {
  ?event rdf:type vocab:signal%20event .
  ?event vocab:SignalEvent_signal ?signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .
  OPTIONAL { ?event vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?action ?signal ?signalName WHERE {
  ?action rdf:type vocab:send%20signal%20action .
  ?action vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .
}
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?action ?prop ?value WHERE {
  ?action rdf:type vocab:send%20signal%20action .
  ?action ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 20

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?action ?signal ?signalName WHERE {
  ?action rdf:type vocab:send%20signal%20action .
  ?action vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?reception ?signal ?signalName WHERE {
  ?reception rdf:type vocab:signal%20reception .
  ?reception vocab:Reception_signal ?signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name ?ref ?refProp WHERE {
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  ?ref ?refProp ?signal .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?event ?signal ?signalName WHERE {
  ?event rdf:type vocab:signal%20event .
  ?event vocab:SignalEvent_signal ?signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?s ?p ?o WHERE {
  ?s ?p ?o .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?s), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?o), "signal"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?action ?signal ?signalName WHERE {
  ?action rdf:type vocab:send%20signal%20action .
  ?action vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?action), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?action ?prop ?value WHERE {
  ?action rdf:type vocab:send%20signal%20action .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?action), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  ?action ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name ?ref ?refType WHERE {
  # Get signals from recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find any element that references this signal
  ?ref ?prop ?signal .
  
  # Make sure ref is NOT in recycle bin
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?ref), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  ?ref rdf:type ?refType .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name ?view ?viewName WHERE {
  # Get signals from recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Check if any view references these signals
  # Views can have ownedElement, or reference activities that use signals
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  
  # Check if element references the signal
  { ?elem vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?signal }
  UNION
  { ?elem vocab:SignalEvent_signal ?signal }
  UNION
  { ?elem vocab:Reception_signal ?signal }
  
  OPTIONAL { ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?viewName }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?s ?p ?o WHERE {
  ?s ?p ?o .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?s), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?s), "signal"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?o), "signal"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?action rdf:type vocab:send%20signal%20action .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?action), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  ?action ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?ref) as ?refCount) WHERE {
  # Get signals from recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find any element that references this signal (in any way)
  ?ref ?prop ?signal .
  
  # Exclude elements in recycle bin
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?ref), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
GROUP BY ?signal ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?refCount)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?view) as ?viewCount) WHERE {
  # Get signals from recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find views that own elements which reference these signals
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  
  # Check if element references signal
  ?elem ?prop ?signal .
  
  # Make sure view is not in recycle bin
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?view), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
GROUP BY ?signal ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?viewCount)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name (COUNT(*) as ?totalRefs) WHERE {
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Any triple where the signal is the object
  ?anySubject ?anyProp ?signal .
}
GROUP BY ?signal ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?totalRefs)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name (COUNT(*) as ?totalRefs) WHERE {
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Any triple where the signal is the object
  ?anySubject ?anyProp ?signal .
}
GROUP BY ?signal ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?totalRefs)
LIMIT 10

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?view) as ?viewCount) WHERE {
  # Get signals from recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find activities that use these signals (via send signal actions)
  ?action vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?signal .
  ?action vocab:ActivityNode_activity ?activity .
  
  # Find views that own these activities (directly or indirectly)
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?activity .
  
  # Make sure view is not in recycle bin
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?view), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
GROUP BY ?signal ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?viewCount)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?s ?p ?o WHERE {
  ?s ?p ?o .
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?s), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?o), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?o), "signal"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?ref) as ?refCount) WHERE {
  # Get signals from recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find elements outside recycle bin that reference these signals
  ?ref ?prop ?signal .
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?ref), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
GROUP BY ?signal ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?refCount)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name ?ref ?refProp WHERE {
  # Get signals from recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  
  # Find elements outside recycle bin that reference these signals
  ?ref ?refProp ?signal .
  
  # Make sure signal is in recycle bin but ref is not
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?ref), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?event ?eventOwner ?signal ?signalName WHERE {
  ?event rdf:type vocab:signal%20event .
  ?event vocab:SignalEvent_signal ?signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .
  
  # Get owner of event
  ?event vocab:Element_owner ?eventOwner .
  
  # Filter: signal in recycle bin, event owner NOT in recycle bin
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?eventOwner), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?event ?activity ?signal ?signalName WHERE {
  ?event rdf:type vocab:signal%20event .
  ?event vocab:SignalEvent_signal ?signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?signalName .
  
  # Get the activity that owns the event
  ?event vocab:Element_owner ?activity .
  
  # Filter: signal in recycle bin, activity NOT in recycle bin
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?activity), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
LIMIT 50

  ?event vocab:Element_owner ?eventOwner .
  
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

  ?action rdf:type vocab:send%20signal%20action .

  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?action), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?viewName ?activity ?activityName WHERE {
  # Get activities from recycle bin
  ?activity rdf:type vocab:activity .
  ?activity vocab:NamedElement_name ?activityName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?activity), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find views that own these activities
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?activity .
  
  OPTIONAL { ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?viewName }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?viewName ?elem ?elemName WHERE {
  # Get views
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  OPTIONAL { ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?viewName }
  
  # Get owned elements
  ?view vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  
  # Check if any owned element is from recycle bin
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  OPTIONAL { ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?view) as ?viewCount) WHERE {
  # Get signals from recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find send signal actions that use these signals
  ?action vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?signal .
  
  # Get the activity containing the action
  ?action vocab:ActivityNode_activity ?activity .
  
  # Find views that contain this activity
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?activity .
  
  # Make sure view is not in recycle bin
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?view), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
GROUP BY ?signal ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?viewCount)

  ?activity vocab:NamedElement_name ?activityName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?activity), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find views that contain these activities
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?activity .
  
  # Make sure view is not in recycle bin
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?view), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  OPTIONAL { ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?viewName }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?ref) as ?refCount) WHERE {
  # Get signals from recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find any element that references this signal
  ?ref ?prop ?signal .
  
  # Make sure ref is NOT in recycle bin
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?ref), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
}
GROUP BY ?signal ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?refCount)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?diagram) as ?diagramCount) WHERE {
  # Get signals from recycle bin
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?signal), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Find elements that reference these signals (outside recycle bin)
  ?ref vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?signal .
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?ref), "_TMT_RecycleBin"))
  
  # Get the activity containing the action
  ?ref vocab:ActivityNode_activity ?activity .
  
  # Find diagrams that contain this activity
  ?diagram vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?activity .
}
GROUP BY ?signal ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?diagramCount)

}
GROUP BY ?signal ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?refCount)

request.reason: After extensive exploration, I found 13 signals in "_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals" but found no references from active diagrams (outside the recycle bin) to these signals. The signals are only referenced by other elements within the recycle bin itself.

request.answer:
No signals under "_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals" are referenced by active diagrams.

After extensive analysis, I found 13 signals stored in the "_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals" package:
- APS-TCS::Receive reply from TCS
- APS-TCS::Ask TCS to point telescope to the star
- APS-TCS::M3_Status_Position_Query
- APS-TCS::M3_Status_Position_Ack
- APS-Internal::signal_GetK-MirrPos_A
- APS-Internal::signal_GetTiltPlate_A
- APS-Internal::signal_SelectFilter_Ack
- APS-Internal::signal_SelectFilter_Query
- APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Query
- APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Ack
- APS-Internal::signal_take_expoure_A
- APS-CommonService::signal_Get_segment_intalled_Ack
- APS-CommonService::signal_Get_segment_intalled_Query

However, these signals are only referenced by other elements within the recycle bin itself (such as send signal actions and signal events that are also in the recycle bin). There are no references from active diagrams (elements outside the recycle bin) to these signals.

events.finalAnswer:
No signals under "_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals" are referenced by active diagrams.

After extensive analysis, I found 13 signals stored in the "_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals" package:
- APS-TCS::Receive reply from TCS
- APS-TCS::Ask TCS to point telescope to the star
- APS-TCS::M3_Status_Position_Query
- APS-TCS::M3_Status_Position_Ack
- APS-Internal::signal_GetK-MirrPos_A
- APS-Internal::signal_GetTiltPlate_A
- APS-Internal::signal_SelectFilter_Ack
- APS-Internal::signal_SelectFilter_Query
- APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Query
- APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Ack
- APS-Internal::signal_take_expoure_A
- APS-CommonService::signal_Get_segment_intalled_Ack
- APS-CommonService::signal_Get_segment_intalled_Query

However, these signals are only referenced by other elements within the recycle bin itself (such as send signal actions and signal events that are also in the recycle bin). There are no references from active diagrams (elements outside the recycle bin) to these signals.
